mood: calm daybreak audio habitat seen through overlapping optical lenses
material_language: translucent mist veils over pale sky fields
damp moss and dark earthen underlayers
thin waveform stems and weather-band filaments
paper-thin provenance tabs half-buried in soil
lighting: diffused early morning light with a soft sky-to-soil gradient, gentle shadows under embedded source surfaces, and small dew-like glints on mineral plaques
object_inventory: two large overlapping circular observatory apertures holding the main air and earth fields
lower garden strata of moss, mulch, listening stones, and embedded album fragments
upper weather layer of pale blue mist, cloud ribbons, and quiet signal arcs
thin red-orange separator arcs echoing optical calibration without becoming labels
small satellite source flecks, tabs, and apertures suspended between air and soil
negative_constraints: no readable words, letters, numbers, filenames, logos, UI labels, or taxonomy callouts inside the image
no desks, dashboards, browser chrome, software panels, source-summary cards, shelves, cabinets, archives, or office props
do not copy the reference image literally or reproduce its subject; borrow only its twin-circle geometry, marbling, palette tension, and edge behavior
avoid blue shrine, altar, lantern habitat, canopy-only forest score, plate-repair, broken ceramic, seed-field, and blush palimpsest compositions
do not make a generic music catalog or grid of album covers; source marks must feel native to the habitat
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
